name: skillhub-local
description: Local web app for managing AI agent skills across your PC

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix packages/frontend install && npm --prefix packages/backend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm --prefix packages/frontend run dev" "npm --prefix packages/backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/frontend run build && npm --prefix packages/backend run build
